provenance.author: mozzarellaARC
provenance.notes: Extracted from Tropical Plants Pack M02P (SM_MZRa_Monstera_B073 variant; the cleanest 2-bucket elephant-ear of four). Subtree pruned, world transform baked, normalized to ground-center pivot. 4 textures webp-compressed. Credit in THIRD-PARTY-ASSETS.md.

lod.label: mesh-near+card-far
lod.rationale: Large elephant-ear leaves are a distinct understory silhouette up close (real mesh), flattening to an alpha card past ~28m. Far band is a planned ground card; a 2.4m broadleaf clump does not warrant an impostor.

bands.notes: Bake a front-view alpha card of the leaf clump from the normalized mesh.
